## Safety checklist

<!-- StationSpark is a safety-first product. Confirm none of these regress. -->

- [ ] Does not weaken 18+ gating, Adult Mode consent, or mutual-opt-in visibility
- [ ] Does not expose exact GPS location, parking spot, or license plate
- [ ] Chat still requires an accepted, unexpired invite between unblocked users
- [ ] Blocks remain bidirectional
- [ ] No secrets committed
